description:
Every game you have ever sat through deserves to be remembered exactly the way it happened — the final score, the ballpark, the moment.

Ballpark Diary is a personal MLB attendance log that fits in your pocket. Share a ticket screenshot, PDF, or digital confirmation into the app and it imports the game automatically. Everything is read on-device. No account to create. No email to connect. Just your tickets.

Once a ticket is in, Ballpark Diary confirms the real final score against official MLB box scores — so your history is always true to the record books. Save a ticket for an upcoming game and the score fills itself in the moment the game ends. You never have to look anything up.

YOUR BALLPARKS, LIT UP ON THE MAP

All 30 MLB stadiums live on an interactive map inside the app. Every park you have visited glows. Every one still dark is a road trip waiting to happen. Whether you are a lifelong season-ticket holder or chasing your first visit to every stadium in the league, the map tells your story at a glance.

CAREER STATS THAT FEEL LIKE BASEBALL HISTORY

Ballpark Diary tracks your all-time win-loss record, the runs and home runs you have witnessed live, and your longest winning streak. It finds your most-seen opponent, calculates your lucky-charm record, and surfaces an On This Day flashback whenever a game in your diary matches today's date. These are the stats no official scorebook keeps — because this one is entirely yours.

BUILT FOR REAL FANS, NOT DATA BROKERS

There are no servers storing your ticket images. No accounts, no passwords, no inbox scanning — ever. Your diary is private, on your device, and as personal as baseball gets.

Older games without a digital ticket? Add them by hand in seconds. Pull down to refresh after sharing new tickets. Create shareable game cards to celebrate a win. And if you want everything the app has to offer, an optional Pro upgrade is waiting.

Your baseball life deserves a proper record. Share your first ticket and start keeping it.

https://ballparkdiary.app
Privacy Policy: https://ballparkdiary.app/privacy
Terms of Use: https://ballparkdiary.app/terms
promotionalText: Share a ticket screenshot — that's it. No account, no email. Ballpark Diary logs the game, confirms the real score, and builds your MLB story.
